items.name: Franka Emika Robot
items.description: Collaborative 7-DOF robot arm for research and industry, with sensitive torque sensors.

items.name: Pixhawk 6x
items.description: Advanced autopilot flight controller for drones and unmanned vehicles, based on FMUv6X standard.

items.name: Kinematics
items.description: Describing motion of objects and systems; crucial in robotics for arm positions and trajectories.

items.name: PID Control
items.description: Feedback mechanism for industrial control and robotics, correcting errors based on P, I, D terms.

items.name: Kalman Filtering
items.description: Algorithm for producing accurate estimates from noisy measurements over time.

items.name: Telerobotics
items.description: Controlling semi-autonomous robots from a distance using wireless or tethered connections.

items.name: Webots
items.description: Open-source robot simulator for modeling, programming, and simulating robots.
